message:
chore(gitignore): Add SQLite WAL/SHM files to ignored patterns

Ignore SQLite runtime journal files (*.sqlite3, *.sqlite3-shm,
*.sqlite3-wal) to prevent tracking ephemeral database state that
changes on every write operation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2,6 +2,11 @@
 target/
 target*/
 
+# SQLite runtime files
+*.sqlite3
+*.sqlite3-shm
+*.sqlite3-wal
+
 # IDE
 .idea/
 .vscode/
